action.description: Avoid routine neoadjuvant endocrine therapy outside a clinical trial in premenopausal HR-positive HER2-negative early-stage disease.

documentation.citation: Premenopausal patients with HR-positive HER2-negative early-stage disease should not routinely receive neoadjuvant endocrine therapy outside a clinical trial. Evidence: korde-et-al-2021-neoadjuvant-chemotherapy-endocrine-therapy-and-targeted-therapy-for-breast-cancer-asco-guideline_pdf: The Bottom Line, Recommendation 4.3
documentation.label: claim-r4-3

action.title: Do not routinely offer neoadjuvant endocrine therapy to premenopausal patients

description: Choose chemotherapy or endocrine downstaging approach for HR-positive HER2-negative disease.
name: AscoBreastCancerGuidelineRecommendationR43Premenopausal
title: Do not routinely offer neoadjuvant endocrine therapy to premenopausal patients
